'Ndrina Gaglianesi.description: The 'Ndrina Gaglianesi is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Catanzaro, Italy. It is involved in organized crime activities typical of the 'Ndrangheta. The clan has a structured hierarchy with several capibastone (bosses) overseeing different neighborhoods of Catanzaro. Notable members include Tommaso Mazza, who became a pentito (collaborator) in 1994.

descriptions: Gaglianesi is listed as an ally of Arena in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Carpino, Costanzo, Dragone, Gaglianesi, Mannolo, Trapasso

descriptions: Girolamo Costanzo, a leader of the Gaglianesi, is also a referent for the Arena clan, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: Girolamo Costanzo, capo e referente degli Arena.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Giacobbe is allied with the Cosca dei Gaglianesi.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Giacobbi è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della zona di Borgia alleata con la Cosca dei Gaglianesi in Calabria .

descriptions: Gate 11 is an ally of AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gate 11- Maccabi Tel Aviv F.C.

descriptions: Compton Varrio Locos is an ally of Fruit Town Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Compton Varrio Locos

descriptions: The Latin Queens are the female counterpart of the Latin Kings, part of the same organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Queen agenda is composed of self-respect, independence, family support, ethnic identity and self-empowerment.

descriptions: Latin Queens is the female branch of the Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Si bien originalmente se pensaba que los Latin Kings eran una organización masculina, eventualmente comenzó a absorber a las mujeres y darles una parte igual.

descriptions: Matranga brothers extorted and intimidated the Provenzano family, leading to a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: They eventually began moving in on Provenzano fruit loading operations intimidating them with threats of violence.

descriptions: The Matranga family was the predecessor of the New Orleans crime family; Carollo succeeded Matranga.
edges.evidence_quote: The Matranga crime family, established by Charles (1857 – October 28, 1943) and Antonio (Tony) Matranga (d. 1890), was one of the earliest recorded American Mafia crime families, operating in New Orleans during the late 19th century until the beginning of Prohibition in 1920.

Elm Street Piru.description: The Elm Street Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, originating in Compton, California. It has spread to other U.S. cities including Brooklyn, Atlanta, and Virginia. The gang has been involved in criminal activities such as recruiting high school students and conspiracy to murder a witness. It remains active as of the 2020s.

descriptions: Cedar Block Piru is listed as an ally of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Tree Top Piru

descriptions: Fruit Town Piru is listed as an ally of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Tree Top Piru

descriptions: Kelly Park Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Santana Blocc Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: South Side Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Tree Top Piru is listed as an ally of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Tree Top Piru

descriptions: Elm Street Piru is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mob Piru , Elm Street Piru , Lueders Park Piru

descriptions: Elm Street Piru is listed as an ally of Mob Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Elm Street Piru

descriptions: The Komarovskaya OPG receives strong support from the Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang for cocaine supply and counterfeit dollar trade.
edges.evidence_quote: Komarovskaya OPG steal automobiles, commit robberies, provide protection racketeering, and receive strong support from the Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang and its AOZT "Putus" to organize the supply of cocaine from South America into Russia, Finland, Scandinavia and Europe and the trade in counterfeit dollars.

descriptions: The Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang works closely with the Komarovskaya organized criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Usvyatsov-Putyrsky gang (AOZT "Putus") ... works closely with the Komarovskaya organized criminal group.

Los Priscos.description: Colombian criminal group affiliated with the Medellín Cartel, active in the 1980s and early 1990s. Named after the four Prisco Lopera brothers, they functioned as the armed wing of the cartel, carrying out assassinations ordered by Pablo Escobar. The group was dismantled in 1991 when its leaders were killed by police.

descriptions: Los Priscos is listed as an ally of Medellín Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Muerte a Secuestradores , Guadalajara Cartel (defunct) , The Extraditables (defunct) , La Corporación (defunct) , Oficina de Envigado , Los Priscos (defunct) , Gallón Gang (defunct) , Galician clans , Gulf Cartel , Nicaragua (alleged) , Cuba (alleged) , Panama (alleged, under Manuel Noriega )

descriptions: Los Priscos are listed as allies of the Medellín Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Priscos

descriptions: Los Priscos were a group of hitmen under the Cartel de Medellín.
edges.evidence_quote: Poco después el 22, resultaron abatidos en un doble operativo lanzado en el departamento de Antioquia, 2 de los hermanos Prisco, jefes de Los Priscos.

descriptions: Los Priscos were affiliated with and acted as the armed wing of the Medellín Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Priscos were a criminal group affiliated with the Medellín Cartel in Colombia.

descriptions: Outlaws merged with the Cult biker club in 1964.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, the Outlaws merged with the Cult biker club from Voorheesville, New York, the Gypsy Outlaws of Milwaukee, and the Gypsy Raiders in Louisville, Kentucky, becoming the largest "one percenter" club east of the Mississippi River

edges.source: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

edges.source: Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

descriptions: Nduma Defense of Congo-Renovated fought alongside Wazalendo to repel M23.
edges.evidence_quote: M23 briefly occupied Kalembe in Walikale Territory before being repelled by Wazalendo and the Nduma Defense of Congo-Renovated

edges.target: Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme
descriptions: These four factions signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS), the Coalition des Mouvements pour le Changement/Forces de Défense du Peuple (CMC/FDP), the Nduma Défense du Congo-Rénové (NDC-R), and the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

descriptions: Bala na Cara acts together with Os Aberto in several cities.
edges.evidence_quote: Atualmente, a facção mantém sua predominância em cidades como Serafina , Santo Ângelo , Cachoeirinha e Bento Gonçalves atuando junto a Os Aberto

descriptions: Os Aberto is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: The Alameddines and Elmirs are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: This suggests that the Alameddines and Elmirs are still allies.

descriptions: The Elmir and Ahmad families were at war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: The war began when Safwan Charbaji, a relative of Steven Elmir, was shot to death at a smash-repair shop by Walid 'Wally' Ahmad in April 2016.

descriptions: Agresta procures drugs from Assisi in Brazil.
edges.evidence_quote: approvvigionandosi in Brasile dagli Assisi

descriptions: Kadyrovite troops executed conscripted soldiers of the Luhansk People's Republic.
edges.evidence_quote: Ukrainian media reported that Chechen troops executed conscripted soldiers of the Luhansk People's Republic who refused to fight.

Soldiers of Aryan Culture.description: A large white supremacist prison gang in the United States, founded in 1997 by Tracy David 'Tinman' Swena in Utah. The gang operates both inside and outside prison walls, engaging in drug trafficking, extortion, and violence. It has a paramilitary ranking structure and requires members to attack sex offenders and informants. The SAC has expanded across multiple states and the federal prison system.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Soldiers of Aryan Culture as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad, Bloods, Piru Street Boys, Crips, East Side Longos, 211 Crew, Soldiers of Aryan Culture, Aryan Circle, Aryan Brotherhood, Nazi Lowriders, Aryan Nations, Lynwood Vikings

descriptions: An Aryan Brotherhood affiliate influenced SAC's founder to start the gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Tracy had been influenced to establish a white power group after an Aryan Brotherhood affiliate introduced him to white supremacist literature sometime in the mid-to-late 1990s.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang is listed as a rival of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños , Big Circle Gang

descriptions: Krieger Verwandt is listed as an ally of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Krieger Verwandt , Silent Aryan Warriors

descriptions: Norteños is listed as a rival of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños , Big Circle Gang

descriptions: SAC and Silent Aryan Warriors jointly planned a bomb plot against Jewish athletes.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the group, along with members of the Silent Aryan Warriors (another white supremacist prison gang), allegedly planned to attack Jewish athletes at the 2002 Winter Olympics

descriptions: SAC and Silent Aryan Warriors were charged together in a drug and firearms distribution case.
edges.evidence_quote: 21 members of the SAC, Silent Aryan Warriors, and Noble Elect Thugs were charged in Utah with distribution of drugs ... and firearms

descriptions: Al-Shabaab originated as a youth militia within the ICU's military wing.
edges.evidence_quote: Formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the wider military wing of the Islamic Courts Union

'Ndrina Cataldo.description: The Cataldo are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cetraro, Italy, with strong presence also in Portigliola, Gerace, and Antonimina. They are allied with the Marafioti and historical rivals of the Cordì. Their illicit activities include drug and arms trafficking, and infiltration into public works and contracts. They have been involved in a long-running feud with the Cordì since the 1960s, with violent clashes continuing into the 2000s.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cataldo 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Cataldo and Cordi were in conflict in the Locri feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Locri : ebbe inizio nel 1967 a causa dell'omicidio di Domenico Cordì compiuto per punire uno sgarro verso Antonio Macrì . Da allora le cosche Cataldo e Cordi si sono combattute a più riprese

descriptions: The Cataldo are historical rivals of the Cordì.
edges.evidence_quote: storici rivali dei Cordì

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina has a long blood feud with Cordì 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: involved in a long blood feud with the Cordì 'ndrina

descriptions: Infobox lists Cordì 'ndrina as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cordì 'ndrina

descriptions: After a truce, the two clans formed a strong alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: they formed a strong alliance aimed at a joint management of the crime business

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina allied with De Stefano 'ndrina during the First 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cataldos allied themselves with the De Stefano 'ndrina from Reggio Calabria in the First 'Ndrangheta war

descriptions: The Cataldo clan helped the De Stefano clan kill Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Macrì was killed with the help of the Cataldo and Mazzaferro clans.

descriptions: The Floccari split from the Cataldo to form their own 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine degli anni '90 i Floccari si staccano dai Cataldo formando una 'ndrina a sé.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: The Cataldo, Marando, and Sergi jointly managed a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 20 maggio 2008 vengono eseguite 48 ordinanze di custodia cautelare ad affiliati alle 'ndrine dei Cataldo, Marando e Sergi che gestivano un traffico di droga.

descriptions: Infobox lists Marando 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marafioti 'ndrina, De Stefano 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina and Marando 'ndrina

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: The Baratto clan collaborated with the Cataldo in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione vi era anche il clan camorristico dei Baratto

descriptions: The Commisso and Cataldo were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 giugno 2009 nell'operazione vengono arrestate 50 persone presunte componenti di un traffico internazionale di droga, tra cui i Commisso e i Cataldo

descriptions: Cataldo clan cooperated with Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan in cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cataldo clan was also involved in cocaine trafficking from Colombia with the Sicilian Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan

descriptions: The Cataldo are allies of the Marafioti.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cataldo sono una potente 'ndrina di Cetraro , alleati dei Marafioti

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina is allied with the Marafioti family.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan, allied with the Marafioti family

descriptions: The Cataldo, Marando, and Sergi jointly managed a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 20 maggio 2008 vengono eseguite 48 ordinanze di custodia cautelare ad affiliati alle 'ndrine dei Cataldo, Marando e Sergi che gestivano un traffico di droga.

descriptions: Infobox lists Sergi 'ndrina as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marafioti 'ndrina, De Stefano 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina and Marando 'ndrina

descriptions: The Cordì are historical rivals of the Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: storici rivali dei Cataldo

descriptions: The feud with the Cataldo resumed in 1993.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 1993 rincomincia la faida con i Cataldo.

descriptions: Cordì and Cataldo clans engaged in a violent feud.
edges.evidence_quote: the so-called Piazza Mercato massacre, which signed the beginning of a long blood feud with the Cataldo 'ndrina

descriptions: After a long feud, the two clans formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cordì and Cataldo clans signed a peace after a bitter feud that lasted for 40 years causing dozens of deaths. They formed a strong alliance

descriptions: A peace was signed with the Cataldo in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2010 dopo ben oltre quarant'anni dall'omicidio di Domenico Cordì nel 1967 sembra si sia siglata una pace con i Cataldo.

descriptions: Cataldo members were among the mandanti (instigators) of Macrì's murder, acting with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: i mandanti furono Paolo De Stefano, Vincenzo, Giuseppe e Francesco Mazzaferro, Giuseppe e Nicola Cataldo

descriptions: Gli Ierinò sono alleati dei Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Mazzaferro dei Cataldo e dei Costa .

descriptions: Members of Clan Cataldo were arrested alongside Lo Presti members in 1993.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono coinvolti e arrestati anche esponenti del clan Cataldo di Locri .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Cataldo sourced cocaine from Marando and Sergi.
edges.evidence_quote: presunti appartenenti alla cosca dei Cataldo di Locri che si rifornivano di cocaina dai Sergi e i Marando

descriptions: The Mazzaferro are allied with the Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: Commisso and Cataldo were arrested together in drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestate 50 persone ... tra cui i Commisso e i Cataldo

descriptions: Cataldo sourced cocaine from Sergi and Marando.
edges.evidence_quote: presunti appartenenti alla cosca dei Cataldo di Locri che si rifornivano di cocaina dai Sergi e i Marando

descriptions: Sergi 'ndrina supplied cocaine to Cataldo 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 May 2008, an anti-drug operation led to 48 pre-trial detention orders against alleged members of the Cataldo 'ndrina from Locri, who were supplied with cocaine by the Sergi and Marando 'ndrine

descriptions: Los Ranas are a Chapitos group.
edges.evidence_quote: On 15 June 2025, video footage captured "Vitache Special Forces" of Chapo Isidro engaged in combat against "Los Ranas" of Chapitos in the Tierra Blanca neighborhood of Culiacán, Sinaloa.

descriptions: Vitache Special Forces (Guasave Cartel) fought Los Ranas (Chapitos).
edges.evidence_quote: On 15 June 2025, video footage captured "Vitache Special Forces" of Chapo Isidro engaged in combat against "Los Ranas" of Chapitos in the Tierra Blanca neighborhood of Culiacán, Sinaloa.

descriptions: Al-Miiqdad Brigade joined Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 January 2017, Suqour al-Sham Brigade along with the Idlib branch of Jaysh al-Islam and the Aleppo branch of the Levant Front joined Ahrar al-Sham. On the following day, al-Miiqdad Brigade also joined Ahrar.

descriptions: The Popeyes enforced a policy against red-and-white color schemes on other clubs, including Zombi MC.
edges.evidence_quote: On multiple occasions, they would forcibly tear the patches off of kuttes of said motorcyclists. Some motorcycle clubs that would be affected by the Popeyes' rules included the Zombi MC, Black Angels MC and Escape Hell MC.

Shirt Tails.description: The Shirt Tails were a mid-19th-century street gang based in the Five Points slum in Manhattan, New York City. They wore their shirts outside their pants as insignia and concealed weapons beneath. Active from the 1830s to the 1860s, they participated in the New York Draft Riots and disappeared shortly before the American Civil War.

descriptions: The Bowery Boys were rivals of the Shirt Tails.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Dead Rabbits, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Tammany Hall

descriptions: Shirt Tails listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: Shirt Tails listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

descriptions: The infobox lists Shirt Tails as an ally of the Kerryonians.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Dead Rabbits, Tammany Hall

descriptions: Atlantic Guards is listed as a rival of Shirt Tails in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards

descriptions: Shirt Tails fought against Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots.
edges.evidence_quote: fought against the Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots

descriptions: Shirt Tails participated in a coalition led by Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: they did participate in a coalition of gangs under the Dead Rabbits

descriptions: Forty Thieves is listed as an ally of Shirt Tails in the infobox.

descriptions: Organized Chaos MC is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos members Ballardo Salcido and Daniel Villalobos, and Organized Chaos MC (a Bandidos support club) vice-president Juan Miguel Vega-Rivera were also shot

descriptions: Special Battalion Zapad opposed Kadyrovites during a confrontation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kadyrovites ended up backing down in that confrontation when another Chechen warlord, Said-Magomed Kakiev, head of the Spetsnaz GRU unit the Special Battalion Zapad, came down on Baisarov's side.

descriptions: Younger Gooch Close is listed as a rival of Doddington in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gooch Close Gang , Younger Gooch Close , Cheetham Hill Gang , Longsight Street Soldiers , Pit Bull Crew , Fallowfield Mad Dogs , Old Trafford Crips , Rusholme Crew Gangsters

descriptions: Bosti is one of the families forming the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: un cartello formato dalle famiglie Licciardi, Contini, Bosti e Mallardo

descriptions: Bosti clan is a component clan within the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Among those who were arrested were the wives of the bosses of the Bosti , Mallardo, Licciardi and Contini clans, as well as their lieutenants, children, grandchildren and entrepreneurs who worked for the alliance.

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with La Gloriosa.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.
